case_title: SYNCHRONY BANK VS. THEODORE BENNETT ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK AS TO DEFENDANT BENNETT, THEODORE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-23-2019
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100106054)
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100043940), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK SERVED APR-05-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BENNETT, THEODORE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-02-2020 CONTINUED TO SEP-01-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100043738) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-02-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-01-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
